name: Published Stem Cell Replacement and Transplantation Surveillance for June 6, 2026
summary: Activity-only field-change update refreshing the exPDite-2 bemdaneprocel phase 3 registry date while keeping the public outlook, stage, momentum, confidence, and LEV-relevant interpretation unchanged.
change_note: No outlook change is proposed. The registry update is activity-only: exPDite-2 remains recruiting, has no posted results, and continues to support momentum only.
